description: Payer integration pack for PhilHealth, the Philippine national health insurance program (universal coverage). Covers eClaims submission configuration, eligibility check configuration, and remittance parsing rules. This is a planning-stage manifest; the adapter connector is not yet implemented in the platform repo. The archive repo contains a prototype PhilHealth connector (Phase 38/40) that is reference material only.

dependencies.rationale: PhilHealth claims require DOH regulatory compliance context. Claim submission rules derive from the regulatory framework.
PhilHealth claims require ICD-10-CM and RVS coding per national standards. Claim validation depends on correct coding system configuration.

configurationKeys.description: Sets PhilHealth CF1-CF4 as the claim format for this payer.
Sets PhilHealth as the active government payer.

capabilityContributions.description: PhilHealth claims capability requires this payer pack active and its adapter connected.
